overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing an astronaut exploring the Fort Solis facility. The character moves through narrow industrial corridors into a large circular atrium containing a bio-dome tree, removes their helmet, and continues exploring various sections including a lounge area and maintenance corridors with shifting lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor approaching Fort Solis airlock

events.description: airlock door opens revealing yellow-lit corridor beyond
lighting shifts from teal to warm yellow entering the maintenance passage

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow industrial corridor toward the Fort Solis entrance airlock

entered.detail: large industrial airlock door with Fort Solis signage above
network of metal pipes running along corridor walls
stacked cargo containers with hazard markings
ceiling-mounted panels emitting cyan emergency lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, teal-lit industrial corridor lined with pipes and supply crates, approaching the Fort Solis airlock door which opens to reveal a warm yellow-lit passage beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular atrium with central bio-dome tree

events.description: exits narrow corridor into vast circular atrium with massive bio-dome tree
character stops walking and removes helmet revealing face

agents.ego_description: entering the atrium and removing helmet to survey the environment

entered.detail: large tree with purple foliage enclosed in a circular planter with illuminated ring
multi-level circular architecture with upper balconies and skylight ceiling
glowing circular light strips embedded in the floor around the tree
elevated walkway with glass railing overlooking the atrium

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast circular atrium dominated by a large bio-dome tree with purple foliage. After entering, the character stops to remove their helmet, revealing the facility's impressive architecture with illuminated walkways and a high ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: atrium perimeter with side lounge and bar area

events.description: briefly enters side bar lounge area off the main atrium
exits lounge and continues around atrium perimeter toward exit

agents.ego_description: walking around the atrium perimeter and briefly investigating a side lounge area with bar counter

entered.detail: curved service counter with stools and illuminated shelving
modern chairs and tables arranged for relaxation
metal stairs leading to upper level with red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character explores the atrium's perimeter, walking past illuminated floor rings and approaching a side lounge area with a bar counter and seating. After a brief look inside, the character continues around the space, passing staircases and control stations while the tree remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridors and emergency-lit red zones

events.description: returns to atrium with red emergency alert lighting activated
approaches heavy industrial door in red-lit security corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through maintenance corridors and exploring areas with emergency red lighting and industrial equipment

entered.detail: narrow passage with warm yellow lighting and exposed conduits
ceiling and wall fixtures casting red alert illumination
reinforced security door with warning signage and locking mechanism
wall-mounted storage cabinets with digital locks

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the atrium through a maintenance corridor with warm yellow lighting, then returns to the atrium now bathed in red emergency lighting. The exploration continues toward heavy industrial doors and staircases in sections with red alert illumination, creating a tense atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile industrial corridor into a grand bio-dome atrium that eventually transforms into a tense emergency zone. It begins in a narrow, teal-lit hallway lined with pipes and crates, moving toward an airlock that opens into a warm, yellow-lit passage. As the camera emerges into a vast circular atrium, the scene expands to reveal a towering tree with purple foliage and illuminated walkways, where the character pauses to remove their helmet. The movement then flows along the atrium's perimeter, passing floor rings and a lounge area with a bar before gliding past staircases and control stations. Finally, the camera exits through a maintenance corridor and returns to the atrium, where the warm lighting has shifted to a stark red emergency glow that casts a tense atmosphere over the industrial doors and staircases.
